##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=James Shigley
##DESCRIPTION=Silver-grey metallic massive and radiating prismatic crystals
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis

##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Co_0.82_Fe_0.12_Ni_0.09_)(As_2.99_S_0.01_) ; (Note: dark phase is lollingite, (Fe_0.69_Co_0.23_Ni_0.11_)(As_1.98_S_0.01_)) Bright spots are native bismuth
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 8.1986 b: 8.1986 c: 8.1986 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 90 volume: 551.09 crystal system: cubic
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
